programs.programName: Maryland Durable Medical Equipment Reuse Program (DME)

verified.notes: Program is free regardless of age, income, or assets for Maryland residents with illness, injury, or disability; phone is for Prince George's County center

programs.notes: Program is free regardless of age, income, or assets for Maryland residents with illness, injury, or disability; phone is for Prince George's County center

verified.notes: CFC eligibility requires Maryland Medicaid (Medical Assistance) financial and nursing facility level of care; no specific age, income, or asset limits unique to CFC found in official sources

programs.notes: CFC eligibility requires Maryland Medicaid (Medical Assistance) financial and nursing facility level of care; no specific age, income, or asset limits unique to CFC found in official sources

verified.notes: Income limit stated as 'no more than 300% SSI for household of one' but no specific USD amount found in sources; phone numbers listed are site-specific, not main statewide

programs.notes: Income limit stated as 'no more than 300% SSI for household of one' but no specific USD amount found in sources; phone numbers listed are site-specific, not main statewide

verified.notes: Values reflect QMB (Qualified Medicare Beneficiary) program tier, the most comprehensive MSP tier in Maryland. Income limits are from Maryland state agency source and align with federal guidelines. Asset limits use federal standards as applied in Maryland. Phone number is Maryland Department of Health Medicare Savings Program line. No age requirement specified in official sources; MSP is available to Medicare beneficiaries regardless of age.

programs.notes: Values reflect QMB (Qualified Medicare Beneficiary) program tier, the most comprehensive MSP tier in Maryland. Income limits are from Maryland state agency source and align with federal guidelines. Asset limits use federal standards as applied in Maryland. Phone number is Maryland Department of Health Medicare Savings Program line. No age requirement specified in official sources; MSP is available to Medicare beneficiaries regardless of age.

verified.notes: No authoritative 2026 data found for senior-specific age threshold, income limits, or asset limits in search results; SNAP generally has no asset test and no senior age minimum (open to all ages with exemptions); phone from MD DHS site.

programs.notes: No authoritative 2026 data found for senior-specific age threshold, income limits, or asset limits in search results; SNAP generally has no asset test and no senior age minimum (open to all ages with exemptions); phone from MD DHS site.

verified.notes: Program also known as Maryland Energy Assistance Program (MEAP); FY26 guidelines apply through June 30, 2026; no age or asset limits specified

programs.notes: Program also known as Maryland Energy Assistance Program (MEAP); FY26 guidelines apply through June 30, 2026; no age or asset limits specified

verified.notes: SHIP has no age, income, or asset eligibility limits; serves Medicare-eligible seniors, families, caregivers. Official state site lists (410) 767-1100 as main contact; shiphelp.org lists 1-800-243-3425.

verified.notes: Income eligibility exists (125% of federal poverty level) but specific dollar thresholds vary annually by household size and are not provided in search results; contact program manager for current income limits. No asset limits found in authoritative sources. Program is active as of 2026.

programs.notes: Income eligibility exists (125% of federal poverty level) but specific dollar thresholds vary annually by household size and are not provided in search results; contact program manager for current income limits. programs.programName: Senior Legal Assistance Program (Sixty Plus Legal Program)

verified.notes: No income or asset limits specified for this program in official sources; preference given to those with greatest economic need. Contact local Area Agency on Aging’s Maryland Access Point (no statewide phone listed). Program also called Senior Legal Assistance Program.

programs.notes: No income or asset limits specified for this program in official sources; preference given to those with greatest economic need. Contact local Area Agency on Aging’s Maryland Access Point (no statewide phone listed). Program also called Senior Legal Assistance Program.

verified.notes: Program has no age, income, or asset eligibility requirements; services are free and available to residents of long-term care facilities (primarily seniors). Phone from secondary source citing official program; no single statewide 'apply' number found, regional numbers vary.

programs.notes: Program has no age, income, or asset eligibility requirements; services are free and available to residents of long-term care facilities (primarily seniors). Phone from secondary source citing official program; no single statewide 'apply' number found, regional numbers vary.
